summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Park-Pal MVP - peer-to-peer parking marketplace. Backend API tests: 22/22 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests: All critical flows working correctly including landing page, registration (host/guest), login, host dashboard with spot management, guest dashboard with map and booking flow, booking history page, and promotion dialog.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stats/host returns host earnings data
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero, features, CTA sections
Frontend: User registration as Host role
Frontend: User registration as Guest role
Frontend: User login with existing credentials
Frontend: Host dashboard with stats cards (Total Spots, Active Now, Earnings, Promoted)
Frontend: Host Add Spot page with map location picker
Frontend: Host Promote dialog with 3 packages (24 Hours, 3 Days, 7 Days)
Frontend: Guest dashboard with Leaflet map
Frontend: Guest search and filter spots
Frontend: Guest spot selection and details view
Frontend: Guest Book Now button opens booking sheet
Frontend: Guest My Bookings navigation button
Frontend: Guest Booking History page with stats and filters
Frontend: Notification bell icon in header

test_credentials.note: Test users created during testing with pattern: uitest_*_{timestamp}@test.com / testpass123

seed_data_creation: Created test parking spots during UI testing that remain active in the system
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend flows are working correctly. The app uses Stripe test mode (sk_test_emergent key) for payments. MongoDB is local. JWT tokens last 7 days. Leaflet/OpenStreetMap is used for maps. Previous test iterations (iteration_1.json, iteration_2.json) exist. Test spots may exist in the database from automated testing.

mocked_apis.Stripe: Using test mode with sk_test_emergent key - checkout sessions are created but payments are not processed
